hero.title: Endless Ragnarok Wiki
hero.description: Master every boss, build the perfect weapon, and survive the endless endgame of Granblue Fantasy: Relink's Endless Ragnarok expansion with co-op guides, weapon builds, and quest walkthroughs.

gameFeature.title: Endless Ragnarok Gameplay
gameFeature.description: Dive into new story content, expanded co-op quest tiers, additional bosses and summons, Master Traits, and The Conflux solo endgame mode across Nintendo Switch 2, PlayStation, and Steam.

releaseDateAndPlatforms.title: Endless Ragnarok Release Date, Platforms, and Store Availability
releaseDateAndPlatforms.intro: Endless Ragnarok expands Granblue Fantasy: Relink with new story content, co-op quest tiers, additional bosses, summons, master traits, and The Conflux solo mode. Existing owners can buy the Upgrade Kit, while newcomers can buy the full Endless Ragnarok edition that includes the base game and expansion content.

items.label: Official Release Date
items.details: The official Endless Ragnarok site lists the game for Nintendo Switch 2, PlayStation 5, PlayStation 4, and Steam. Steam's US store listing shows Jul 8, 2026 because of regional store timing.

items.label: Nintendo Switch 2
items.details: The official site lists Nintendo Switch 2 as a supported platform. This version is positioned for newcomers who want the full Endless Ragnarok package.

items.label: PlayStation 5 and PlayStation 4
items.details: The PlayStation Store lists the Endless Ragnarok Standard Edition for PS4 and PS5, plus Standard and Special Upgrade Kit add-ons.

items.label: Steam
items.details: Steam lists the Upgrade Kit Standard Edition, Upgrade Kit Special Edition, and full Endless Ragnarok bundles for players on PC.

items.label: Online Co-op
items.details: The PlayStation Store lists support for up to 4 online players with PS Plus. Steam lists Online Co-op and Cross-Platform Multiplayer features.

items.label: Crossplay
items.details: Steam lists Cross-Platform Multiplayer, and the expansion promotes 4-player online co-op across platforms.

items.label: Game Type
items.value: Action RPG expansion and updated edition
items.details: Endless Ragnarok adds expanded solo and multiplayer content to Granblue Fantasy: Relink rather than replacing the original game.

editionsAndUpgradeKit.title: Which Endless Ragnarok Edition Should You Buy?
editionsAndUpgradeKit.intro: The official product lineup separates Endless Ragnarok into two purchase paths: a full edition for newcomers and an Upgrade Kit for players who already own Granblue Fantasy: Relink. The Special Editions add the Endless Ragnarok Special Pack and the Granblue Fantasy: Relink DLC Collection.

items.edition: Granblue Fantasy: Relink - Endless Ragnarok Standard Edition
items.bonus: Eligible purchase versions may include the Guts III & Autorevive III Sigil Set pre-order bonus.
items.notes: Choose this if you do not already own Granblue Fantasy: Relink.

items.edition: Granblue Fantasy: Relink - Endless Ragnarok Special Edition
items.bestFor: New players who want bundled DLC
items.bonus: Eligible purchase versions may include the Guts III & Autorevive III Sigil Set pre-order bonus.
items.notes: Choose this if you want the base game, the expansion, special character colors, useful items, and previously released DLC in one package.

items.edition: Endless Ragnarok Upgrade Kit Standard Edition
items.bonus: Steam early purchase bonus includes Supplementary Damage V and War Elemental Sigil Set when purchased by 11:59 p.m., Aug 31, 2026 local time.
items.notes: Requires the Granblue Fantasy: Relink base game on the same platform.

items.edition: Endless Ragnarok Upgrade Kit Special Edition
items.bestFor: Existing owners who want the expansion plus DLC extras
items.bonus: Includes special character colors for the captain, Id, and Sandalphon, plus useful items for unlocking Seofon, Tweyen, and Sandalphon.
items.notes: The Steam listing also includes Color Packs 1-5 and Emote Expansion Sets through the DLC Collection.

items.bestFor: Collectors and console players buying retail copies
includes: Granblue Fantasy: Relink - Endless Ragnarok full edition
items.bonus: First production physical copies include the Guts III & Autorevive III Sigil Set bonus.
items.notes: Physical bonus content is limited to the first production run.

beginnerGuide.title: How to Start Endless Ragnarok as a New or Returning Player
beginnerGuide.intro: Endless Ragnarok is built for both newcomers and existing Relink players. New players should begin with the full Endless Ragnarok edition, while returning players can continue from Granblue Fantasy: Relink using the Upgrade Kit on the same platform.

steps.title: Choose the right purchase path
steps.description: Buy the full Endless Ragnarok edition if you are new to Granblue Fantasy: Relink. Buy the Upgrade Kit only if you already own the base game on the same platform.
steps.result: You avoid buying duplicate content and start with the correct version.

steps.title: Learn the core Relink basics first
steps.description: Check the official manual sections for Getting Started, Heads-Up Display, Controls, Gameplay Overview, Battles, Character Building, Main Menu, Photo Mode, and Online Play.
steps.result: You understand movement, combat flow, character setup, and multiplayer basics before entering expansion content.

steps.title: Pick a simple early character role
steps.description: Use the Captain for a balanced starter path, Katalina for protection, Rackam or Eugen for ranged play, Io or Cagliostro for magic, and Vane or Vaseraga for heavier frontline play.
steps.result: You can learn fights faster without switching between too many playstyles at once.

steps.title: Prepare for new expansion systems
steps.description: Endless Ragnarok adds summons, master traits, new co-op quest tiers, additional bosses, and expanded solo and multiplayer content.
steps.result: You know which new systems matter before spending upgrade materials.

steps.title: Use online co-op when difficulty rises
steps.description: Relink supports 4-player online co-op, and Endless Ragnarok adds higher quest tiers and more bosses. Bring upgraded characters and match your role to the party's needs.
steps.result: Harder quests become easier to clear with coordinated damage, support, and survival tools.

steps.title: Move into The Conflux after story progression
steps.description: The Conflux is Endless Ragnarok's new solo mode, built around unpredictable challenges and special powers inside a separate endgame-style activity.
steps.result: You get a clear next goal after learning the expansion's story and combat systems.

charactersAndBestRoles.title: Endless Ragnarok Characters, Roles, and Playstyle Picks
charactersAndBestRoles.intro: Endless Ragnarok brings back the Granblue Fantasy: Relink crew while highlighting major new and returning figures such as Beelzebub, Fediel, Fraux, and The World. Use role tags to choose a character by playstyle instead of relying on unsupported tier rankings.

items.bestFor: New players learning combat, skills, and party basics
items.officialContext: The main character commands the crew and begins the journey across the Zegagrande Skydom.

items.bestFor: Players who want safer clears, team protection, or utility-focused play
items.officialContext: Katalina is described as Lyria's protector, Vane as a knight devoted to protecting allies, and Cagliostro as the founder of alchemy.

items.bestFor: Players who prefer attacking from distance or managing fights with safer positioning
items.officialContext: Rackam is the Grandcypher's helmsman, Eugen is a veteran skyfarer, Io is a young mage, and Tweyen is the bow master of the Eternals.

items.bestFor: Players who enjoy active dodging, close-range pressure, and fast attack rhythm
items.officialContext: These allies are presented through weapon-focused identities such as Twinfang Prodigy, Tiny Justice, Illusory Fencer, Ephemeral Blade, and Crimson Spear.

items.bestFor: Players who prefer slower, stronger hits and frontline pressure
items.officialContext: Vaseraga fights with Great Scythe Grynoth, Percival is the Lord of Flames, Siegfried is the Dragonslayer, and Ghandagoza is the Eternal Rage Grandmaster.

items.bestFor: Players looking for important late-game or DLC-linked characters
items.officialContext: Seofon leads the Eternals, Tweyen is the bow master of the Eternals, and Sandalphon commands the archangels as the Primarch of Promises.

items.bestFor: Players focusing on new Endless Ragnarok character content
items.officialContext: Fraux is the pactbearer to The Devil and Fediel is one of the Six Dragons with dominion over darkness.

items.bestFor: Players tracking the expansion's biggest narrative threats and boss-style characters
items.officialContext: Beelzebub is called the Eternity Ender, while The World is one of the Arcarum created by the Astrals.

buildsAndMasterTraits.title: Endless Ragnarok Builds and Master Traits
buildsAndMasterTraits.intro: Endless Ragnarok deepens character progression with Master Traits, an expanded Sigil system, and new endgame build options. Use these build fundamentals to plan upgrade materials and party roles for post-game content.

faqs.question: What are Master Traits in Endless Ragnarok?
faqs.answer: Master Traits are character-specific progression upgrades that unlock new combat behaviors and stat boosts. Endless Ragnarok expands the Master Trait options for the cast, giving each character more ways to specialize for damage, survival, or support.

faqs.question: How do Sigils work in Endless Ragnarok builds?
faqs.answer: Sigils are slotted into each character's loadout to add stats, traits, and conditional effects. Endless Ragnarok adds new Sigils such as the Supplementary Damage V and War Elemental sets, which are included as early-purchase bonuses on Steam.

faqs.question: Which Endless Ragnarok build should I start with?
faqs.answer: Start with a balanced damage Sigil set plus one defensive option such as Guts or Autorevive, then add character-specific Master Traits that match your playstyle. Upgrade one weapon and one Sigil loadout at a time before branching into specialist builds.

faqs.question: How do I farm upgrade materials for Endless Ragnarok builds?
faqs.answer: Repeatable co-op quests and The Conflux solo mode are the main sources of endgame upgrade materials. The higher quest tiers added in Endless Ragnarok drop the materials needed to refine Sigils and unlock advanced Master Traits.

faqs.question: Do Endless Ragnarok builds work in co-op?
faqs.answer: Yes. Your character build carries into 4-player online co-op. Coordinating roles such as primary damage, break specialist, support, and survival lets harder quests clear more consistently.

confluxModeGuide.title: Endless Ragnarok Conflux Mode Guide
confluxModeGuide.intro: The Conflux is Endless Ragnarok's new solo endgame mode, built around unpredictable challenges and special powers that change from run to run. It is designed for repeatable progression after the story.

cards.name: Solo Roguelite Structure
cards.description: The Conflux is a single-player mode where each run reshuffles challenges, modifiers, and rewards, so no two runs play out the same way.

cards.name: Special Powers Per Run
cards.description: Inside The Conflux you pick up special powers that buff your character for the current run, encouraging adaptive builds instead of one fixed loadout.

cards.name: Post-Story Unlock
cards.description: The Conflux opens up after you progress through the Endless Ragnarok story, giving you a clear endgame goal once the main content is complete.

cards.name: Repeatable Reward Farming
cards.description: Conflux runs are the main loop for farming endgame upgrade materials, Master Trait resources, and Sigil refinement drops.

cards.name: Built For Experimentation
cards.description: Because powers and challenges rotate, The Conflux rewards trying different characters and build directions rather than optimizing one strategy.

highlights: Enter The Conflux after story progression
Adapt your build to each run's powers

bossesAndSummons.title: Endless Ragnarok Bosses and Summons
bossesAndSummons.intro: Endless Ragnarok adds new bosses, Ragnalia enemies, and an expanded summon system. Use this preparation order to handle the expansion's harder fights and make the most of summons in battle.

steps.title: Learn the new Ragnalia enemies
steps.description: Endless Ragnarok introduces Ragnalia foes with their own attack patterns. Watch for telegraphs and learn which moves can be blocked, dodged, or interrupted before committing to a combo.

steps.title: Prepare a boss-ready loadout
steps.description: Bring a refined Sigil set with damage plus a survival option such as Guts or Autorevive. Stack break power against bosses that expose weak points during specific phases.

steps.title: Use summons at the right moment
steps.description: Summons are charged through combat and unleashed for high-impact effects. Time your summon activation to match a boss's vulnerable window rather than spending it as soon as it is ready.

steps.title: Coordinate primal bursts in co-op
steps.description: In 4-player co-op, stack primal burst timing with your party to maximize break and damage phases. Assign roles so one player handles support while others focus on burst windows.

steps.title: Repeat higher tiers for materials
steps.description: The new co-op quest tiers drop the materials needed to refine builds and summons. Loop the hardest tiers you can clear consistently to farm upgrade resources.

crossplayAndOnlineCoop.title: Endless Ragnarok Crossplay and Online Co-op
crossplayAndOnlineCoop.intro: Endless Ragnarok supports 4-player online co-op with cross-platform multiplayer across Nintendo Switch 2, PlayStation, and Steam. Use this overview to understand party setup and platform compatibility before joining friends.

items.label: Online Co-op
items.details: Endless Ragnarok supports 1-4 player online co-op. PlayStation online play requires a PS Plus subscription.

items.label: Cross-Platform Multiplayer
items.details: Steam lists Cross-Platform Multiplayer, so Nintendo Switch 2, PlayStation, and Steam players can join the same quests.

items.label: Crossplay Requirement
items.details: All party members need Endless Ragnarok content. Existing owners use the Upgrade Kit on the same platform where they own Granblue Fantasy: Relink.

items.label: Cygames ID
items.details: Linking a Cygames ID unlocks Link Bonuses and ties your progression to your account across participating platforms.

items.label: Platform Accounts
items.details: Console players use their platform's online service, while Steam players use Steam for matchmaking and friends.

items.label: Solo Play
items.details: All story and Endless Ragnarok content can be played solo. Co-op is optional for quests that allow it.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Endless Ragnarok

questions.question: What is Endless Ragnarok?
questions.answer: Endless Ragnarok is a major expansion and updated edition for Granblue Fantasy: Relink, developed by Cygames. It adds new story content, characters, bosses, summons, Master Traits, The Conflux solo mode, and 4-player online co-op across Nintendo Switch 2, PlayStation, and Steam.

questions.question: When does Endless Ragnarok release?
questions.answer: Endless Ragnarok releases on July 9, 2026 for Nintendo Switch 2, PlayStation 5, PlayStation 4, and Steam. Steam's US store listing shows July 8, 2026 because of regional store timing.

questions.question: Do I need Granblue Fantasy: Relink to play Endless Ragnarok?
questions.answer: Only if you buy the Upgrade Kit. New players can buy the full Endless Ragnarok edition, which includes the base game and the expansion. Existing Granblue Fantasy: Relink owners buy the Upgrade Kit on the same platform.

questions.question: Does Endless Ragnarok support crossplay?
questions.answer: Yes. Endless Ragnarok supports cross-platform multiplayer across Nintendo Switch 2, PlayStation, and Steam for up to 4 players in online co-op. PlayStation online play requires PS Plus.

questions.question: What is The Conflux in Endless Ragnarok?
questions.answer: The Conflux is Endless Ragnarok's new solo endgame mode. It uses a roguelite structure with unpredictable challenges and special powers that change each run, making it the main loop for endgame farming.

questions.question: Are there Endless Ragnarok codes?
questions.answer: Endless Ragnarok does not use traditional redeem codes. Rewards come from Cygames ID Link Bonuses, pre-order bonus Sigil sets, and first-production physical copy bonuses instead of code redemption.

cta.title: Ready to Conquer Endless Ragnarok?
cta.description: Join the Granblue Fantasy: Relink community on Discord for Endless Ragnarok guides, builds, updates, and co-op discussions!
